homepage.title: Danny Beales MP | Uxbridge and South Ruislip | Labour
homepage.h1: DANNY'S WORK IN UXBRIDGE AND PARLIAMENT
homepage.meta_description:
It is the honour of my life to have been elected as the first ever Labour Member of Parliament for Uxbridge and South Ruislip. This is where I was born, where I was raised, and where I still call home today. 

Danny Beales MP
headings: h2: With Labour, NHS treatment waiting lists have fallen
h2: Government has closed eleven asylum hotels
homepage.text_excerpt: --> Danny Beales MP | Uxbridge and South Ruislip | Labour top of page Home Latest News About Danny Monthly Newsletter Help for Constituents Get in touch Services Directory More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. It is the honour of my life to have been elected as the first ever Labour Member of Parliament for Uxbridge and South Ruislip. This is where I was born, where I was raised, and where I still call home today. ​ As your MP, it is my job to help you. My team and I are ready to support you with any problems you may face so please make sure to get in touch if you think we can be of assistance. First name * Last name * Email * Postcode * By ticking this box I consent to the office of Danny Beales MP contacting me via the details above. www.dannybeales.com/privacy * Subscribe me to Danny's newsletter. Submit Home Latest News About Danny Monthly Newsletter Help for Constituents Get in touch Services Directory More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. DANNY'S WORK IN UXBRIDGE AND PARLIAMENT Campaigns & Local Priorities Fighting Cuts to School Funding Last year, I worked with the Department for Education to block Hillingdon Council’s plans to cut school budgets in the borough by £7 million. Now they’re proposing a further £3 million cut. ​ I’m fighting once again to make sure this doesn’t happen. Uxbridge Town Centre Post Office Hillingdon Council confirmed that no alternative site has been chosen for a new post office in Uxbridge when the current one closes. For many, post offices are a lifeline, and we need one in the heart of Uxbridge. Agree? Sign our petition: https://t.co/2jpLeFRm3v Campaigning for a Youth Employment Hub I joined colleagues from Uxbridge College and the Hillingdon Chamber of Commerce to talk about the need for greater opportunities for young people looking for work in Hillingdon. ​ I’ll be working in partnership with local groups to fight for a Youth Employment Hub in the area. National Issues Boost in SEND Funding Backed by £4 billion in additional funding, the Government has unveiled a plan to fix our broken SEND system. ​ I know how much this matters to you - if you’re a constituent and have any questions or thoughts, get in touch at danny.beales.mp @parliament.uk. Military Homes Fit for Heroes Uxbridge and South Ruislip has the fifth largest military housing stock of all the constituencies. I spoke in Parliament about how these military homes must be fit for the heroes who live there. ​ Following years of neglect, this Government is rebuilding military housing in Uxbridge and South Ruislip. Situation in the Middle East I understand the situation in the Middle East is deeply concerning. You can register your presence to the UK Government here: www.gov.uk/government/news/foreign-office-travel-advice-updates. If any residents need my support please contact my office by emailing danny.beales.mp@parliament.uk . LATEST NEWS FROM DANNY Uxbridge town centre report Since being elected in July 2024, my team and I have been taking a range of actions to tackle town-centre issue, from pressing for increased police resources and tougher national rules on shoplifting and mobile phone theft, to working with TfL on fare evasion and transport improvements. I recognise that there is still much to be done to make our town centre the best it can be. It is important for me to continue listening to residents. As a result of this, I arranged a drop-in 2 days ago With Labour, NHS treatment waiting lists have fallen Pleased to see that under Labour, the number of patients waiting for treatment is down. After years of record waiting lists under the Tories, this is real progress and I look forward to seeing it continue. 3 days ago Government has closed eleven asylum hotels Welcome news in Hillingdon! h2: Hillingdon is receiving £2.8 million as part of Labour's new SEND service
pages.text_excerpt: --> Latest News | Danny Beales MP top of page Home Latest News About Danny Monthly Newsletter Help for Constituents Get in touch Services Directory More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. All Posts National Issues Local Campaigns In Uxbridge & South Ruislip In Parliament Uxbridge town centre report Since being elected in July 2024, my team and I have been taking a range of actions to tackle town-centre issue, from pressing for increased police resources and tougher national rules on shoplifting and mobile phone theft, to working with TfL on fare evasion and transport improvements. I recognise that there is still much to be done to make our town centre the best it can be. It is important for me to continue listening to residents. As a result of this, I arranged a drop-in 4 days ago With Labour, NHS treatment waiting lists have fallen Pleased to see that under Labour, the number of patients waiting for treatment is down. After years of record waiting lists under the Tories, this is real progress and I look forward to seeing it continue. 5 days ago Government has closed eleven asylum hotels Welcome news in Hillingdon! The Government has closed eleven asylum hotels and returned them to local communities, with more closures coming this spring. This includes the Holiday Inn Heathrow in Hillingdon. These closures will save taxpayers nearly £65 million a year, with overall asylum costs already down by nearly £1 billion since this Government took office. This is part of the Government's plan to end the use of asylum hotels entirely this Parliament. Apr 21 Hillingdon is receiving £2.8 million as part of Labour's new SEND service Hillingdon is receiving £2.8 million as part of Labour's new Experts at Hand SEND service. Experts at Hand brings specialist professionals directly into local schools to support children with SEND - educational psychologists, occupational therapists and speech and language therapists all available closer to home. Apr 21 danny.beales.mp@parliament.uk ​ ​ 01895 913563 Email: ​ Phone: Follow Danny on Social Media: GET IN TOUCH Privacy Policy > Acceptable Behaviour Policy > © 2024, The 1900 Creative LTD . pages.title: About Danny | Danny Beales MP
pages.meta_description: It is the honour of my life to have been elected as the first ever Labour Member of Parliament for Uxbridge and South Ruislip. This is where I was born, where I was raised, and where I still call home today.
headings: h2: NEED HELP WITH A LOCAL ISSUE?
pages.text_excerpt: --> About Danny | Danny Beales MP top of page Home Latest News About Danny Monthly Newsletter Help for Constituents Get in touch Services Directory More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. ABOUT DANNY Danny was born in Hillingdon Hospital and lived in South Ruislip up until he was made homeless - where he had to leave the area. After being the first person in his family to be accepted to university he returned to London. ​ Since then he has worked with Local Government for 10 years, delivering over 1000 new homes - providing a safe, secure place to live for children who grew up like him and helping tackle the country's housing crisis. Before being elected as a Member of Parliament, Danny worked in the health care sector for charities. Since being elected to Parliament, he has been elected as a member of the Health and Social Care Select Committee and has used his position to challenge officials on failing dentistry services, the desperate need for our new Hillingdon Hospital, and modernising the NHS. Danny also serves as a member of the All Party Parliamentary Group for Ending Homelessness and for Temporary Accommodation - using his professional and personal experience to further advocate for those at risk of homelessness. NEED HELP WITH A LOCAL ISSUE? My team and I are here to help in any way we can. Click the button below to raise an issue with us. GET IN TOUCH danny.beales.mp@parliament.uk ​ ​ 01895 913563 Email: ​ Phone: Follow Danny on Social Media: GET IN TOUCH Privacy Policy > Acceptable Behaviour Policy > © 2024, The 1900 Creative LTD .
